mapper.sql: id, account_id, balance, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified
mapper.insert: insert into payment_wallet (account_id, balance, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified) values (#{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balance,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into payment_wallet
account_id, balance, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified,
#{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balance,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update payment_wallet set account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, balance = #{balance,jdbcType=BIGINT}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update payment_wallet set balance = balance + #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, version = version + 1, gmt_modified = NOW() where id = #{walletId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
